summary: Normalize agmws/agmbo as BE-main profiles and remove the proposed generic fallback.
backend_profile allows only agmws or agmbo and is required for target_kind=be-main.
Provider sync, six workflow tests, package and official validators, taxonomy assertions, and 69 golden hashes passed.
agmws and agmbo are now the only BE-main backend profiles; no generic fallback exists.
